edge_hypothesis: Supertrend direction flips are the cleanest binary trend-change signal — no ambiguity, no parameter-dependent threshold interpretation. But the existing 4 Supertrend specs gate at ADX 20-35 uniformly. This spec tests a different hypothesis: Supertrend signals are ONLY worth taking when the trend is already STRONG (ADX>30+). In weak trends, Supertrend flips are noise; in strong trends, they mark genuine regime shifts. The key insight from advisory data: ETH/4h trending PF=1.054, meaning strong trends DO follow through in crypto. By requiring ADX>30 and using extended hold periods (30-50 bars on 4h = 5-8 days), we ride the entire trend move instead of taking profit too early. This is a 'conviction filter' approach — trade less, hold longer, win bigger.
regime_assumption: Exclusively targets strong trending regimes (ADX > 30). This is deliberately restrictive — the hypothesis predicts that most Supertrend flips in weak/moderate trends are false signals. Only when ADX confirms strong directional movement should the flip be trusted. Invalidates in ranging (ADX < 20) and transitional (ADX 20-30) — these are explicitly excluded. Expected trade frequency: very low (1-3 per week on 4h), compensated by higher win rate and larger average win.

variants.name: supertrend_strong_trend
variants.description: Supertrend flip with ADX>30 gate and 3:1 R:R. Control variant to test whether high-ADX gating improves Supertrend signal quality on ETH/4h. Different from existing specs which use ADX 20-25 — this requires ESTABLISHED strong trend.
entry_long: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive on bar close (trend change to bullish).
Require ADX_14 > 30 (strong trend confirmed before entry).
entry_short: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative on bar close (trend change to bearish).
Require ADX_14 > 30 (strong trend confirmed before entry).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Regime gate: ADX_14 > 30 (strong trend only — conviction filter)
exit_rules: Exit on SUPERTd_7_3.0 flipping direction (trend reversal).
Exit on ADX_14 dropping below 20 (trend dying).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (30 bars = ~5 days on 4h).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Supertrend whipsaw in choppy high-ADX market
Hypothesis failure mode guard: ADX spike from news event with no sustained trend
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry (moderate buffer for 4h volatility).
Take profit at 6.0x ATR_14 from entry (3:1 R:R).
Conviction filter: fewer entries mean each must deliver higher return.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip as entry trigger

variants.name: supertrend_marathon_hold
variants.description: Supertrend flip with ADX>25 and maximum hold period (50 bars = ~8 days on 4h). Tests the 'let winners run' thesis: ETH/4h trends persist for days (advisory data shows trending PF=1.054). By extending hold time and using 5:1 R:R, we maximize trend capture per trade. This variant sacrifices win rate for average win size.
entry_long: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive on bar close.
entry_short: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative on bar close.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Extended hold: 50 bars max (~8 days on 4h, marathon hold)
exit_rules: Exit on ADX_14 dropping below 18 (trend dissipating).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (50 bars = ~8 days on 4h).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Trend stalls but doesn't reverse (trade dies slowly)
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Multi-day consolidation eats into unrealized gains
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry (wide stop for multi-day hold).
Take profit at 12.5x ATR_14 from entry (5:1 R:R — trend runner).
Marathon hold thesis: crypto trends can persist 3-8 days on 4h before exhaustion.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — marathon hold variant

variants.name: supertrend_eth1h_test
variants.description: Supertrend flip on ETH/1h to test whether the same signal works on shorter timeframe. Advisory shows ETH/1h has ranging edge (PF=1.115) — Supertrend may catch trend initiation moments from range extremes. Moderate ADX gate (>22) and standard R:R. If successful, validates cross-timeframe signal robustness.
entry_long: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive on bar close.
entry_short: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative on bar close.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Cross-timeframe test: 1h version of 4h Supertrend thesis
exit_rules: Exit on ADX_14 dropping below 15 (trend gone).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (20 bars = ~20h on 1h).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 1h noise producing frequent whipsaw flips
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Higher trade frequency negating fee optimization
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 from entry (tighter for 1h timeframe).
Take profit at 4.5x ATR_14 from entry (3:1 R:R).
1h timeframe: tighter parameters to account for faster signal cadence.
